name: Lizard Island Resort
description: Exclusive all-inclusive luxury island resort on the Great Barrier Reef with 24 private beaches and world-class diving

name: Jackalope Hotel
description: Bold contemporary design hotel set among vineyards with immersive art installations, infinity pool, and award-winning dining

name: Spicers Sangoma Retreat
description: Intimate all-inclusive eco-retreat with eight private suites overlooking eucalyptus valleys, 90 minutes from Sydney

name: Capella Lodge
description: Boutique nine-suite lodge on UNESCO World Heritage Lord Howe Island with stunning ocean and Mount Gower views

name: Silky Oaks Lodge
description: Eco-luxury retreat nestled in the world's oldest rainforest on the Mossman River with treehouse spa treatments

name: Spicers Peak Lodge
description: Australia's highest non-alpine mountain lodge perched 1,100 metres above sea level with panoramic Scenic Rim views

name: Thorngrove Manor
description: Fantasy-like castle hotel with turrets, towers, and individually designed suites offering absolute privacy and exclusivity

name: Southern Ocean Lodge
description: Clifftop luxury lodge with floor-to-ceiling Southern Ocean views, rebuilt after 2020 bushfires by Baillie Lodges

name: Saffire Freycinet
description: Award-winning all-inclusive lodge overlooking Wineglass Bay with immersive food experiences and architecture mirroring the Hazards

name: Longitude 131
description: Luxurious tented desert camp with direct Uluru views, exclusive guided Red Centre experiences, and fine dining beneath the stars

name: The Ritz-Carlton Melbourne
description: Soaring luxury hotel occupying the top floors of an 80-storey tower with panoramic views of Port Phillip Bay and the Dandenong Ranges

name: The Interlude
description: World's first urban wellness retreat set within the historic bluestone walls of the former Pentridge Prison with 19 heritage suites

name: Hyde Melbourne Place
description: Lifestyle hotel on Russell Street with rooftop restaurant, cocktail bar, and contemporary design by Kennedy Nolan

name: Drift House
description: Small luxury hotel with six architecturally designed suites blending Victorian heritage with striking modern design

name: 1 Hotel Melbourne
description: Sustainable luxury hotel with reclaimed materials and lush greenery along the Yarra River in the revitalised North Wharf precinct

name: QT Sydney
description: Theatrical boutique hotel within the historic Gowings and State Theatre buildings blending Gothic, Art Deco, and Italianate architecture

name: Ace Hotel Sydney
description: First Ace Hotel in the Southern Hemisphere celebrating local artists and culinary talent in the historic Tyne Building

name: The Eve Hotel
description: Modern boutique hotel with rooftop pool and restaurant reflecting the creative energy of Sydney's Redfern district

name: Basq House
description: Stylish 32-room coastal retreat in the heart of Byron Bay combining laid-back surf culture with refined elegance

name: Il Delfino Seaside Inn
description: Charming 1948 oceanfront inn where laid-back Australian surf culture meets Mediterranean charm with five intimate suites

name: Wildlife Retreat at Taronga
description: Eco-lodge within Taronga Zoo offering luxury harbour-view accommodation immersed among native Australian wildlife

name: Capella Sydney
description: Grand Edwardian Baroque sandstone heritage building transformed into a luxury hotel in Sydney's historic precinct

name: The Langham Sydney
description: Elegant five-star hotel renowned for old-world glamour, exceptional spa with starlit pool, and harbour views

name: Park Hyatt Sydney
description: Iconic harbourside luxury hotel with unrivalled Opera House views and 155 rooms featuring commissioned Australian art

name: Osborn House
description: Heritage guesthouse since 1892 reimagined with playful maximalist interiors, spa, and pool in the Southern Highlands

name: Four Seasons Hotel Sydney
description: 34-storey five-star hotel at Circular Quay with sweeping harbour views, the largest heated outdoor hotel pool in Sydney

name: Crystalbrook Albion
description: Eclectic 35-room boutique hotel in a restored 1903 convent with rooftop garden and views over Surry Hills

name: Qualia
description: Private luxury retreat with 60 pavilions at the northern tip of Hamilton Island surrounded by Great Barrier Reef waters

name: The Calile Hotel
description: Australia's first urban resort and design icon on James Street with subtropical landscaping, pool, and six restaurants

name: Empire Spa Retreat
description: Serene adults-only spa retreat surrounded by vineyards and bushland featuring native botanical treatments

name: COMO The Treasury
description: Luxury hotel within beautifully restored 19th-century State Buildings with COMO Shambhala Spa and acclaimed dining

name: Henry Jones Art Hotel
description: Australia's first dedicated art hotel in converted 19th-century waterfront jam factory with hundreds of artworks throughout

name: The Islington Hotel
description: Intimate 1847 Georgian mansion turned boutique retreat with 11 rooms, eclectic art, antiques, and mountain views

name: The Tasman
description: Architectural blend of 1840s Georgian heritage, 1940s Art Deco, and modern extension with 152 rooms in Hobart's CBD

name: MACq 01 Hotel
description: Australia's first storytelling hotel with 114 rooms celebrating Tasmanian history through design on the waterfront
